message:
Fix SecurityIssues isRefreshing to use actual hook value (#4836)

Destructure isRefreshing from useCachedSecurityIssues() instead of
using a manually computed proxy (cachedLoading && hasData). The proxy
conflated initial loading with background refresh, causing the refresh
spinner to behave incorrectly.

Fixes #4829

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
